description_long: This is a modern wooden-framed sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a light wood structure and three rectangular, light gray seat and back cushions. The frame is constructed from a warm-toned wood with visible grain, and the armrests and backrest are composed of vertical wooden slats, giving it an open and airy appearance. The front of the sofa includes three rectangular panels beneath the seat, which may serve as decorative or functional storage elements. The cushions are uniform in size and appear to be attached, providing a clean and streamlined look. The sofa sits low to the ground, with the wooden frame extending to the floor and no visible legs. This piece would be suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings, such as parks, public plazas, or modern communal spaces.
description: A modern wooden sofa with light gray rectangular cushions and a slatted wood frame, featuring three front panels and a minimalist, open design. The sofa has a warm wood finish and uniform, attached cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing three light gray cushions, a slatted wood frame, and three rectangular panels beneath the seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and back cushions, the vertical slats on the armrest, and the solid wood frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the wooden slatted backrest and the continuous wood grain pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the armrest slats and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, rectangular seat and back cushions, all attached and evenly spaced across the sofa.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat wooden armrests at seat height, featuring vertical slats and a solid wood top with no visible padding.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the wooden frame extends to the floor, creating a block-like base with full contact along the bottom edges.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three attached rectangular cushions and a slatted wooden support structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
